title: hieracium neosparsum
intro: Hieracium neosparsum is a perennial plant species within the sunflower family, known for its yellow daisy-like flowers and potential medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may be useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and infections. Research suggests that Hieracium neosparsum may offer health benefits including reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are often used to create teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used externally or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
